scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client
scripts.build: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma db seed && npm start
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
